blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,879 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
